advice: AQI above 150 is harmful for prolonged outdoor exposure. Reduce time outside and use a protective mask.
Rain with two-wheeler travel increases accident risk. Carry rain gear, reduce speed, and consider delaying non-urgent trips.
High temperatures increase dehydration risk. Drink water frequently and avoid peak sun hours.
Strong winds can reduce driving stability and create flying debris hazards. Secure loose items and stay alert.
High humidity can increase fatigue for outdoor work. Use short shaded breaks and hydrate often.
